titleStmt.title: SII 9.683: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 683. (A.R. No. 409 of 1928.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE OUTER PRAKARA OF THE MAHALINGESVARA TEMPLE AT BASRUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and the date and the king's name are lost. It mentions Sadāśivarāya-Nāyaka and Bārakūra-rājya and records that Timmaṇṇaseṭṭi and his elder brother Chemmaṇa-Heggaḍe lent 350 varāhas, of which they had made a gift for the worship of the god Mahādēva at Paḍuvakēri, to the residents of Ānegaḷi village. The interest on the amount was payable to the temple of Mahādēva for conducting the worship of the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē(ṁ) namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiracuṁbi
caṁdracāmaracāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamū
la bhāya svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivā
ya prajōtpatyasaṁvatsarada
nmamahārājādhi rājapa
rāyamahārāya ya
citayisi sakala śrīma
yiha kāladalu rāyarani
jyavanū sadāśivarāyanāyakarū
Āḷutihali Avara ṁrāpaku
rakūra siṁhāsanadali Āḷuti paḍu
vakērya mahādēvara dharmake A halaru seṭi muṁtiṭṭunā
gaṇahegaḍeya maga toṁbhatina kavaḍicabaḷiya tirumahegaḍe
ya Aḷiya tiṁmaṇaseṭiyū barasida śilāśāsanada kramaveṁ
teṁdare timaṇaseṭiya Aṁṇa ceṁmaṇahegaḍe mahādē
varige dharmake hākida varaha ga 300 tiṁmaṇaseṭi taṁma dharmake ko
ṭṭa varaha ga 50 Aṁtu varaha ga 350 Akṣaradalū yive mu
nūraAyivattu varaha yī varahake baḍi prativaruṣa 1 ke vara
ha ga 35 Akṣaradalu yive mūvataAyidu varahana
baḍḍiyanū nāu Ānegaḷiya Ūru samastarige mayisālavā
gi koṭa varaha ga 350 yī hoṁnige baḍḍi prati varuṣa 1 kke do
ḍa varaha ga 35 varahana niṁma hoṁna baḍḍige hēḷi ko
ṭṭadake naḍava dhar(ṁ)ma niṁna Aṁṇa beṁmaṇahegaḍe dharmmake ko
ṭa varaha ga 300 ke Adara baḍi varaha ga 30 naḍava dharmma kṣa
yasaṁvatsara Ārabhya kālakālada kārtika śu 1 Ārabhya
Ā śuddha 14 nelege dina hādinākakke dina 1 kke mahādēvaru durga
dēviya raṁgapūje paṁcāmruta sahasranāma voḷataḷi dīvige
tiṁmaṇaseṭi koṭa varaha ga 50 ke baḍḍi varaha ga 5 ke mahā
dēvara Amrutapaḍi dina 1 ke Aki hā 1 ra lekadalū kālakā
lake naḍasuvarū �yo yeraḍu bageya dharmavanū Uḷiya
da hāge halaru seṭigārarū siriyaṁgaḍiya halarū vi
cārisi Uḷiyadahāge Ācaṁdrārkavāgi naḍasikoḍuva
rū Ānegaḷiya Ūriṁda voṁdu kālada baḍi bārade Uḷi
darū halaru seṭṭigāraru pereyiṁda hoṁna koṭu
�yo dharma Uḷiyada hāge naḍasikoḍuvarū �yo dha
rmmavanū Ācaṁdrārkkavāgi naḍasuvarū �yo dharmake tappidava
ruṁṭādare sūryagrahaṇa caṁdragrahaṇa pu(ṁ)ṇyakāla
dalū kāśiyali sāvira kavileya koṁda dōśake hōharu
mahādēvarige tiṁmaṇaseṭi tāṁbarabhēriya kāṇikeyā
gi māḍisi koṭanu A dharma tiṁmaṇaseṭiyadu . dānapālana
yōrmadhyē dānāchryēyōnupālanaṁ dānāsvarggamavā
pnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . �yo śāsana baradavanu hari
sēnabōvara maga nāgayyasēnabōvana baraha kālakālada kārtika śu
1 Arabhya A śu 14 varege dina hadināku dinada rātriyalli naḍa
va raṁgapūje yeṁbadu tiṁmaṇaseṭi māḍidallade matto
bbaradu salladū maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.683 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
